title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 63.
content:
There was an Old Person of Cromer,
    Who stood on one leg to read Homer;
    When he found he grew stiff,
    He jumped over the cliff,
    Which concluded that Person of Cromer.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 63." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
